## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Desktop app (`XstReader`)
- [ ] Shared parser/library (`XstReader.Base`)
- [ ] CLI exporter (`XstExport`)
- [ ] Documentation or repository metadata only

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build XstReader.sln`
- [ ] Tested the changed path locally
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior or build steps changed

## Risk Notes

List any parser, platform, packaging, or compatibility risks.
